description: NIST Building 423 IAQ Manufactured House DAQ - Configuration Template
project_name: Building 423 IAQ Manufactured House - Data Acquisition and Backup System
_setup_instructions: 1. Copy this file to 'data_config.json' in the repository root
2. Replace all YOUR_* placeholders with your actual network paths
3. Verify network paths are accessible before running scripts
4. For sensitive data (API keys): use environment variables, NOT in config
5. Keep data_config.json in .gitignore - each user maintains their own copy

local_sources.description: Local desktop source folders - EDIT THESE PATHS FOR YOUR SYSTEM

indoor_daq.description: Task Logger output (indoor DAQ data from cDAQ-9178 chassis)

outdoor_weather.description: Met One AIO2 weather station data via serial logger

remote_destinations.description: Network backup destinations - EDIT THESE PATHS FOR YOUR SYSTEM

mission.description: Primary backup - Mission network drive (all data)

epa_shower.description: EPA project backup - 2026 data only (TEMPORARY - will be removed)

thermostat.description: Ecobee thermostat data backup (OPTIONAL - coming soon)
